summary: postinstall script exfiltrates host information and executes remote curl commands
details: On install, the package's postinstall.js automatically runs and harvests installer-side host data (os.hostname(), cwd, version fields, filesystem reads via fs.readFileSync) and transmits it via https.request POST to a hardcoded network destination. The same script invokes child_process to spawn `curl` commands at multiple call sites, a classic dropper/exfiltration pattern that runs without consent the moment `npm install` completes. The combination of os/host enumeration, filesystem reads, outbound HTTPS POST of collected fields, and curl-based command execution inside an automatically-fired lifecycle hook constitutes a supply-chain attack against any installer.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
